purpose: 从公开且授权可读的采购、Brief、JD、官方培训、研究、奖项、年报和生产工具手册中，提取小红书内容的隐藏生产闭环；不把商业结果或组织意图误写成自然推荐规律。

scope.older_material_policy: Only retained when it contains a still-useful production-risk observation and is explicitly dated.

method.research_question: Which public artifacts reveal executable production contracts, handoffs, versioning, supply provenance, measurement, and service loops that are absent from ordinary traffic playbooks?
inclusion_gate: The source is publicly accessible or an authorized public copy.
The artifact exposes at least one production object: inputs, roles, brief fields, approval, version, payment, disclosure, metric definition, data provenance, business handoff, or failure condition.
The useful claim can be separated from traffic or sales causality.
The source adds something beyond generic authenticity, utility, scene, search, comments, or first-screen consistency advice.

claim_status_values.observed_artifact: The field, workflow, or limitation is explicitly visible in the cited artifact.
claim_status_values.supported_workflow: More than one bounded artifact or a transparent study supports the workflow in its own scope.
claim_status_values.hypothesis: A production control inferred from source observations and requiring a local test.

evidence_grades.A: Current official rule/help/job/procurement page or first-party product fact; supports only the visible scope.
evidence_grades.B: Official filing, original research, or transparent named material; supports bounded organizational or sample observations.
evidence_grades.C: Public live brief, recruitment-platform JD, award/agency self-report, or single-project requirement; useful as a workflow clue, not causal proof.
evidence_grades.D: Aggregator, summary, or incomplete context; discovery lead only.

already_covered: transfer the decision logic rather than surface form
dedupe_against.exclusion_action: No mechanism in this asset merely restates these content formulas.
This asset adds variable contracts, supply provenance, labor records, version lineage, attribution, and service handoffs.

hard_boundaries.rule: Never infer organic recommendation causality from paid-delivery, award-case, annual-report, or mixed campaign outcomes.
Never hide commercial relationships, compensation, platform programs, or creator labor to manufacture the appearance of spontaneous recommendation.
Never fabricate first-person experience, customer quotes, tests, data, comments, screenshots, author identity, or product access.
Contract cadence, staffing, budget, attribution window, and paid-product thresholds remain source-specific; they are not platform constants.
Identity joins, CRM matching, private-message collection, and offline attribution require a lawful purpose, minimum data, authorization, security, and an opt-out path.
Tool tracking windows and refresh schedules describe that tool's observation capability, not the platform content lifecycle or algorithm.
AI drafts cannot supply unverified facts, first-person experience, customer speech, or image evidence; human confirmation and applicable disclosure remain mandatory.

source_records.title: 新媒体运营服务采购项目
source_records.sample_or_scope: One six-month Xiaohongshu operations procurement requirement.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: A procurement scope, not an execution report; promotion is included but paid media is not separately described.
direct_observations: The requirement separates account planning, content planning, original production, publishing/promotion, interaction, and data review.
cannot_support: that the supplier executed each item

source_records.title: 2025年新媒体运营服务采购需求
source_records.author_org: 陕西政府采购公开文件
source_records.sample_or_scope: One public new-media operations procurement document.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Staffing and publishing cadence are buyer capacity requirements.
direct_observations: Planning, editing/publishing, material capture/organization, production equipment/software, onsite roles, interaction, and data review are distinct requirements.

source_records.title: 连锁餐饮抖音与小红书运营 Brief
source_records.sample_or_scope: One buyer request covering Douyin and Xiaohongshu.
source_records.distribution_context: mixed; paid service requested as a separate quote
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Anonymous buyer and no delivery or outcome record.
direct_observations: The request uses a shared shoot and allows store staff to capture under remote guidance.
Platform-specific captions, tags, and phrasing are required after editing.
Paid services are quoted separately and a one-month trial is requested.
cannot_support: that shared capture is always more efficient
that the requested cadence is optimal

source_records.title: 美瞳品牌小红书官方账号 Brief
source_records.author_org: 川扬商贸（上海）有限公司
source_records.sample_or_scope: One new-account operations request.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: A requirement, not an execution or outcome report.
direct_observations: The brief explicitly inventories available brand book, VI, product imagery, and assets that still require video production.

source_records.title: 海外高校小红书独立运营 Brief
source_records.sample_or_scope: One completed buyer request.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: The brief combines engagement and follower growth without a clear primary job or paid flag.
direct_observations: Positioning, monthly output, design/cover, interaction, trend adjustment, reporting, and review are separate deliverables.
The buyer asks whether content is original and requests relevant portfolios.
cannot_support: that composite engagement is an adequate KPI
that the requested monthly volume is optimal

source_records.title: 999感冒灵2024—2025社交运营招标
source_records.author_org: 华润三九 / 广告门公开招标页
source_records.sample_or_scope: One named brand social operations tender across platforms.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Annual operations, campaigns, creators, and channels are mixed commercial interventions.
direct_observations: Always-on brand-account content/user operations and annual planning are separated from campaign/event and creator strategy execution.

source_records.title: 去哪儿2025届内容运营岗位
source_records.sample_or_scope: One multi-platform content-operations role.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: A recruitment requirement, not proof of current execution; multi-platform scope.
direct_observations: The role covers matrix accounts, member training/rules/incentives, content monitoring, iterative analysis, and an ultimate in-app order metric.

source_records.title: 小红书创作者策略运营岗位
source_records.sample_or_scope: One official creator-strategy operations vacancy.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: A role description is not an algorithm specification.
direct_observations: The role links data mining and business insight to product/algorithm strategy and creator/post growth, and requests A/B experiment design and analysis skills.
cannot_support: that every platform decision is A/B tested

source_records.title: 小红书热点创作者社区运营岗位
source_records.sample_or_scope: One official hot-topic creator-community vacancy.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: The role proves capability and intent, not that a specific topic was organized.
direct_observations: The role describes content production through creator communities, activities, and directed invitations, and supports creators around topic events.
cannot_support: that any named trend is platform-created
that invited content receives guaranteed traffic

source_records.title: 笔记营销操作说明
source_records.sample_or_scope: Xiaohongshu paid note-marketing product.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: All creative advice is tied to a paid ad product and its delivery surfaces.
direct_observations: Multiple video creatives can be placed in one paid plan for selection.
The page discusses the first five seconds for paid video and lists feed, search, and video-stream placements.
cannot_support: that paid winners will win organically

source_records.title: 直播间成交推广说明
source_records.sample_or_scope: Xiaohongshu paid live-room promotion product.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: The event definitions and optimization guidance are product-specific.
direct_observations: The page distinguishes promotion objectives and describes holding budget, targeting, and note variables while comparing plans.
It defines event deduplication, 24-hour and 7-day attribution contexts, GMV including refunds, and ROI.
cannot_support: net revenue when refunds are not removed

source_records.title: 成本保障说明
source_records.sample_or_scope: One paid-product guarantee/disclaimer page.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: The disclaimer addresses paid live commerce, not organic content.
direct_observations: The page states that effects are also influenced by live-room operations and external competition, and does not guarantee sales or ROI.
cannot_support: that paid delivery has no effect

source_records.title: The Informal Labor of Content Creators: Situating Xiaohongshu’s Key Opinion Consumers in the Creator Economy
source_records.author_org: Huiran Yi and Lu Xian, University of Michigan
source_records.sample_or_scope: Digital ethnography 2021-12 to 2023-09; 16 creators and 8 industry informants; coding May-December 2023.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Small, anonymized, historical sample; participant statements are not official platform rules.
direct_observations: The study describes KOC pools, spreadsheet/account review, subjective screening, word-level review, revisions, procurement bids, compensation after approval, and CPE/CPRE budgeting.
It analyzes how commercial labor can be obscured to appear spontaneous.
cannot_support: that every brand or agency follows this workflow
concealing sponsorship as an acceptable practice

source_records.title: 顾家家居高客单线下归因奖项案例
source_records.author_org: 顾家家居 / ROI Festival entry
source_records.sample_or_scope: One self-submitted, paid/mixed high-ticket furniture case.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Entrant-selected story and outcomes; content, media, KOS, product, stores, and first-party data are mixed; privacy implementation is not disclosed.
direct_observations: The entry says it used intermediate metrics, multi-round paid testing, KOS co-creation, and a connection to first-party offline transaction data.
cannot_support: the reported causal effect or ROI
that the identity-join method is legally sufficient or transferable

source_records.title: 爱慕股份2025年年度报告
source_records.author_org: 爱慕股份 / 上海证券交易所
source_records.sample_or_scope: One listed company's 2025 annual self-report.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Company self-report; content, retail, membership, stores, and channels are mixed interventions.
direct_observations: The report defines KOS around sales capability, vertical and brand knowledge, and sharing real experience/insight.
It describes a self-operated KOS model connected with platform data, store acquisition, and off-store service.
cannot_support: that KOS content caused acquisition or sales

source_records.title: 欣贺股份2025年年度报告
source_records.author_org: 欣贺股份; public annual-report mirror
source_records.sample_or_scope: One listed company's 2025 annual report including a 2026 operating plan.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: The most useful statements are future plans, not achieved outcomes.
direct_observations: The report's 2026 plan describes a Xiaohongshu seed-search-convert path, membership/inventory integration, online order and store fulfillment, and turning capable store guides into content creators.
cannot_support: that the plan improved traffic or sales

source_records.title: Clustered governance: how Chinese social media platforms curate and control influencers' content creation
source_records.sample_or_scope: Ethnographic study of invite-only thematic creator groups and platform operations.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Some numeric proportions and thresholds are former-employee or participant estimates, not official constants.
direct_observations: Within the study sample, operators issued campaign briefs with theme, tags, timing, style, and angle; creators reported posts back; operators manually selected some content for additional distribution.
Participation did not guarantee traffic and group retention could depend on activity completion and operator judgment.
cannot_support: that all creator groups work this way
that any specific trend was platform-organized
a universal completion threshold or manual-selection proportion

source_records.title: AI passing and invisible authenticity labor
source_records.author_org: Xiaolong Su et al., Communication University of China and collaborators
source_records.sample_or_scope: 16 content creators; 10 primarily operated on Xiaohongshu.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Interview self-report; individual time estimates are not industry averages; the sample is not all Xiaohongshu.
direct_observations: Creators described using AI for topics, scripts, titles, and optimization, then performing fact/trend verification, colloquial rewriting, narrative reconstruction, and camera-performance repair.
Reported failure modes include fabricated sources, stale trends, formal template voice, formulaic brand voice, and teleprompter-like delivery.
cannot_support: that hiding AI use is desirable
a fixed checklist that detects all AI-generated content

source_records.title: KAWO: Creating Xiaohongshu Notes
source_records.sample_or_scope: First-party documentation for one paid social-media management SaaS.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Product capability does not prove adoption or effectiveness.
direct_observations: The workflow exposes content calendar, image/video type, asset library, image order and first-image cover, video cover, title, body, tags, location, schedule, preview, and archive fields.
cannot_support: that most brands use this sequence

source_records.title: KAWO: Creating and Setting up the Approval Process
source_records.sample_or_scope: First-party documentation for approval workflow features.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: A configurable workflow, not a prescribed universal process.
direct_observations: Approval can vary by platform/content type and include multiple nodes, one-person or all-person approval, and external reviewers.
A rejected revision can return to the rejecting node or restart the full workflow.
cannot_support: that more approval nodes are better
that the workflow reduces errors or increases traffic

source_records.title: KAWO Data Tracking
source_records.sample_or_scope: First-party documentation for one analytics product's tracking window.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Tracking duration is a tool limit and can depend on paid/custom capabilities.
direct_observations: The system says it automatically tracks daily; Xiaohongshu owned-account posts are tracked for 30 days and competitor posts for 10 days; longer history is a custom capability.
cannot_support: that Xiaohongshu posts stop growing after 10 or 30 days

source_records.title: KAWO: Account vs. Post Metrics
source_records.sample_or_scope: First-party documentation for data provenance in one analytics product.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: The described sources and refresh rates are product-specific.
direct_observations: The documentation says owned-account reporting and public competitor Xiaohongshu data use different sources, while metric refresh schedules also differ, producing discrepancies.
cannot_support: that one source is always more accurate

source_records.title: iKF招聘编制
source_records.author_org: 东莞市啊呜科技 / 广州软件学院就业平台
source_records.sample_or_scope: One company's recruitment demand across KOC content, scripts, capture, editing, media, promotion, private-domain, and operations-assistant roles.
source_records.conflict_or_confounding: Recruitment headcount is planned demand, not actual staffing; duties do not prove every project follows the topology.
direct_observations: The recruitment page separates product-selling-point interpretation, content creation, script/quality control, photography/editing, creator/media budget, promotion, review, and private-domain feedback into distinct roles.

mechanisms.name: 开写前生产合同
mechanisms.novelty_vs_existing_assets: Adds asset readiness, rights, deliverable variants, role ownership, approval topology, paid flags, and acceptance before content formulas are applied.
input_materials: product facts, limitations, and compliance boundaries
owners, approval nodes, revision cap, deadline

title: Map every promise to an authorized evidence asset.
If evidence is unavailable, downgrade a result claim to a question, process, or clearly qualified statement.
cover: Pass person, product, scene, before/after, trademark, and reuse rights through the asset gate.
Do not publish placeholders or unapproved assets.
body: Separate verified fact, human experience, inference, and brand requirement.
Mark missing proof as blocked instead of completing it with invented details.
workflow: Separate always-on account work, campaign work, creator collaboration, interaction/DM, paid delivery, analytics, and service handoff.
Define who approves what and whether a rejected revision returns to one node or restarts approval.

metrics.name: intake_field_completeness
metrics.definition: required brief fields completed before drafting

metrics.name: asset_blocker_count
metrics.definition: missing or unauthorized assets blocking a claim

metrics.name: first_pass_approval_rate
metrics.definition: deliverables accepted without material revision

metrics.name: mean_revision_rounds
metrics.definition: revision rounds per approved rendition

metrics.name: scope_change_count
metrics.definition: new requests outside the accepted brief

metrics.name: on_time_delivery_rate
metrics.definition: accepted deliverables completed by contract deadline

failure_conditions: The brief specifies only output count and composite engagement.
Assets will be supplied later but result claims are already written.
No owner, acceptance node, revision limit, paid flag, or review time exists.
Procurement cadence or staffing is treated as a platform best practice.
One vague all-in operator role hides production, approval, media, analytics, and business handoffs.

case_examples.observation: Official procurement scopes split planning, production, publishing, interaction, equipment/roles, and review.
Live briefs reveal asset inventories and separate deliverables; one also illustrates ambiguous composite KPI design.
Approval-system documentation and recruitment design reveal explicit nodes and cross-role handoffs.
case_examples.confounders: tool capability and planned roles do not prove adoption

mechanisms.paid_causality_guard: The contract must record paid context, but its completion cannot be claimed to improve organic traffic.

next_test.design: For 20 consecutive tasks, score brief completeness before drafting and record blockers and revision rounds.
next_test.primary_outcome: revision rounds and preventable rework, not traffic
next_test.stop_condition: Stop if tracking would expose personal or client-confidential data.

mechanisms.name: 母素材—渠道成品分离
mechanisms.novelty_vs_existing_assets: Separates shared capture evidence from platform-specific published artifacts and measurement.
input_materials: aspect ratio, safe area, cover requirements

title: Rewrite for the Xiaohongshu audience, scene, and search/save job rather than copying another platform title.
cover: Select a frame that independently proves the promise and rebuild Xiaohongshu-specific information hierarchy.
body: Reorder evidence around a user decision question and add conditions, tradeoffs, and reusable details.
Use only tags that describe the actual artifact.
workflow: Maintain capture_id to rendition_id to publish_id lineage.
Approve remote raw footage before editing and keep paid quotations/results separate.

metrics.name: must_have_shot_completion
metrics.definition: required proof shots captured and usable

metrics.name: raw_asset_usability
metrics.definition: captured assets accepted for at least one rendition

metrics.name: channel_first_pass_approval
metrics.definition: renditions accepted for their target channel

metrics.name: cross_channel_text_duplication
metrics.definition: unmodified copy reused across channels

metrics.name: paid_organic_ledger_completeness
metrics.definition: cost and outcome records separated by delivery context

failure_conditions: Remote staff cannot execute the shot list.
Raw footage lacks the evidence needed for the claim.
All platforms use identical title, cover, body, and tags.
Paid media cost is merged into content production.
The published artifact cannot be traced back to raw material.

case_examples.observation: A live restaurant-chain brief asks for shared capture, remote store guidance, platform-specific copy/tags/phrasing, separate paid quotation, and a trial.

mechanisms.paid_causality_guard: Paid and organic renditions must have separate IDs, costs, and outcomes.

next_test.design: Use one authorized raw-asset set to create independently briefed renditions for two channels while holding paid media at zero.
next_test.primary_outcome: first-pass approval, target-semantic comments, and production hours
next_test.stop_condition: Stop if the raw set cannot support both channel jobs without misleading claims.

mechanisms.name: 创作者协作留痕
mechanisms.novelty_vs_existing_assets: Turns native-feeling creator collaboration into an auditable labor, rights, disclosure, and revision process rather than a surface style.
input_materials: creator fit evidence and historical content
actual product access and use conditions

title: Review factual risk without forcing every creator into the same brand slogan.
Preserve an entry point consistent with the creator's historical voice.
cover: Do not impose identical staged photography across all creators.
Require truthful product/person/scene relationships and separate authorization for paid reuse.
body: Separate immutable facts, mandatory disclosure, and creator-controlled expression.
Allow real tradeoffs and non-fit conditions; never require pretending to be an unprompted buyer.
workflow: Record requester, reason, affected field, and cost/schedule impact for each revision.
Reconfirm compensation and timeline after the agreed revision cap.

metrics.name: qualified_creator_rate
metrics.definition: selected creators with documented fit and authentic product access

metrics.name: mean_revision_rounds
metrics.definition: revision rounds before approval

metrics.name: factual_revision_share
metrics.definition: revisions tied to verifiable facts or compliance rather than style homogenization

metrics.name: on_time_payment_rate
metrics.definition: approved work paid by the agreed date

metrics.name: disclosure_completeness
metrics.definition: commercial/platform relationship correctly disclosed

metrics.name: reuse_rights_completeness
metrics.definition: paid amplification and derivative use covered by authorization

metrics.name: creator_withdrawal_or_complaint
metrics.definition: withdrawals, disputes, or complaints tied to collaboration process

failure_conditions: Volume substitutes for creator fit.
Requirements are opaque while every word is reviewed.
Commercial labor is intentionally hidden to appear spontaneous.
Unlimited unpaid revisions erase creator voice.
Content is amplified or repurposed without authorization.

case_examples.observation: The study records large creator pools, spreadsheet screening, word-level review, repeated revision, approval-linked compensation, and under-recorded commercial labor.

mechanisms.paid_causality_guard: Compensation and paid amplification must remain visible; traffic outcomes cannot be labeled organic without source-level evidence.

next_test.design: For the next authorized creator cohort, log fit evidence, revision reason, payment, disclosure, and reuse rights.
next_test.primary_outcome: revision burden, disputes, disclosure, and on-time delivery
next_test.stop_condition: Do not collect unnecessary creator personal data.

mechanisms.name: 话题供给来源标签
mechanisms.novelty_vs_existing_assets: Adds supply-generation provenance before interpreting content density as durable user demand.
input_materials: search suggestions and independent user questions

title: When samples cluster around a program, transfer only a real user job, not the common campaign slogan.
Disclose the applicable relationship.
cover: Treat repeated templates, assets, and program marks as supply clues, not sufficient proof of user preference.
body: Tag each sample as spontaneous, brand_campaign, platform_program, paid_distribution, or unknown.
Promote a problem into the demand pool only when it appears across independent sources and persists beyond the incentive window.
workflow: Keep evidence URL and confidence for every supply-source tag.
Never infer that a specific trend was manipulated without direct evidence.

metrics.name: independent_source_count
metrics.definition: unique, non-duplicative sources for the same user problem

metrics.name: outside_program_share
metrics.definition: samples not tied to the same brand/platform activity

metrics.name: post_incentive_persistence
metrics.definition: duration of independent questions after the program window

metrics.name: common_brief_trace_share
metrics.definition: samples with shared slogan/template/asset traces

metrics.name: unknown_supply_share
metrics.definition: samples whose production source cannot be determined

failure_conditions: One activity's 100 posts are counted as 100 independent needs.
Content volume is used without source audit.
An official job or research finding is used to accuse a specific topic or creator.
Paid impressions are treated as search demand.
Numeric group thresholds from participant reports are generalized.

case_examples.observation: An official vacancy describes organizing hot-topic supply through communities, activities, and directed invitations.
A peer-reviewed ethnographic sample records brief-to-group-production-to-reporting-to-manual-selection and retention/incentive flow.
case_examples.confounders: bounded sample; participant estimates are not constants

mechanisms.paid_causality_guard: Paid distribution and platform programs remain distinct supply labels and cannot be merged into spontaneous demand.

next_test.design: Sample one trend daily for 14 days and code supply source, independent user question, and persistence after visible activity ends.
next_test.stop_condition: Do not identify or accuse individual creators when provenance remains unknown.

mechanisms.name: 付费实验指标合同
mechanisms.novelty_vs_existing_assets: Adds event dictionaries, attribution/dedup/refund rules, controlled variables, and explicit paid-only scope to creative tests.

title: Change only the declared variable for a comparison and keep the promise consistent with the landing/live experience.
cover: Treat cover or paid-video opening as versioned variables; do not change cover, title, audience, and budget together then attribute the result to one field.
body: Record exact version differences, time, delivery surface, and edits.
The paid-video first-five-seconds guidance remains limited to the cited paid product.
workflow: Separate organic baseline and paid ledger.
Show raw events, deduplicated events, attributed events, gross including refunds, net after refunds, and final business result when available.
Use a predeclared stop/change condition.

metrics.name: version_spend
metrics.definition: paid spend by version and plan

metrics.name: raw_target_events
metrics.definition: observed product-defined events before deduplication

metrics.name: deduplicated_events
metrics.definition: events after the documented deduplication rule

metrics.name: attributed_orders
metrics.definition: orders assigned within the documented window

metrics.name: net_after_refund
metrics.definition: orders or GMV after refunds/cancellations when data exists

metrics.name: paid_roi
metrics.definition: return under a stated numerator, denominator, and window

metrics.name: handoff_conversion
metrics.definition: live room or page ability to convert the paid event

failure_conditions: The attribution window is selected after results are known.
Gross GMV including refunds is treated as net revenue.
Multiple variables change simultaneously.
Plans are edited frequently without recording model/learning impact.
Only the best version is reported.
A paid creative winner is presented as an organic recommendation rule.

case_examples.observation: An official creator-strategy vacancy asks for A/B experiment design and analysis skills.
case_examples.confounders: role competency only; no experiment threshold, method, or effect

case_examples.observation: The official paid-note manual supports multiple creatives within a paid plan and paid-video opening optimization.
The official paid-live manual exposes objective, controlled-variable, deduplication, attribution-window, gross-GMV, and ROI definitions.
The official disclaimer names live-room operations and external competition and does not guarantee sales/ROI.

mechanisms.paid_causality_guard: All source-derived numeric/creative guidance in this card is limited to the cited paid products; no organic conclusion is allowed.

next_test.design: Pre-register objective, event, window, dedup/refund treatment, stable variables, one creative variable, and stop condition for an authorized paid experiment.
next_test.primary_outcome: predeclared paid objective and net business result
next_test.stop_condition: Stop or revise when inventory, landing/live-room operations, or compliance changes invalidate comparability.

mechanisms.name: 一线专家采集—服务交接
mechanisms.novelty_vs_existing_assets: Connects frontline product knowledge, truthful identity, content evidence, inventory/service handoff, and user-question feedback.

title: Lead with a real service task or judgment for a specific body, need, or scene.
Do not fabricate customer quotations or disguise staff as ordinary consumers.
cover: Use actual products and visible fit/use differences with a truthful professional identity.
State regional, price, or inventory conditions where relevant.
body: Question, decision rule, demonstration, tradeoff, fit/non-fit, and official next step.
Do not solicit personal data outside approved channels.
workflow: Send comment/inquiry questions to frontline owners.
Return inventory, size, service, order/non-order, and complaint causes to the next topic cycle.

metrics.name: qualified_product_questions
metrics.definition: questions matching supported products, regions, and service scope

metrics.name: official_inquiries
metrics.definition: inquiries through approved channels

metrics.name: appointment_or_store_visit
metrics.definition: qualified appointments or visits under a defined source rule

metrics.name: attributed_net_orders
metrics.definition: orders after refund under a documented attribution method

metrics.name: inventory_mismatch
metrics.definition: content promise not available in the relevant store/region/time

metrics.name: return_or_service_complaint
metrics.definition: downstream fit, product, privacy, or service failures

metrics.name: question_feedback_cycle_time
metrics.definition: time from user question to verified content update

failure_conditions: Frontline experts receive no content or compliance training.
Product knowledge is unverified or inventory/pricing is stale.
Public engagement is treated as store outcome.
Staff are pressured to impersonate buyers.
Personal data is collected outside authorization.
No one owns inquiry/service handoff.

case_examples.observation: Aimer's filing describes KOS around sales, vertical/brand knowledge, real experience, platform data, store acquisition, and off-store service.
Xinhe's report states a 2026 plan for creator store guides, membership/inventory integration, and store fulfillment.
A recruitment portfolio separates product interpretation, content, quality, media, promotion, and private-domain feedback roles.

mechanisms.paid_causality_guard: Content, KOS, media, stores, membership, and service are mixed; no traffic or sales result is attributed to content alone.

next_test.design: Pilot with one authorized expert, one product family, one region, and an approved inquiry path; log questions, inventory mismatch, service outcomes, and returns.
next_test.primary_outcome: qualified service resolution and mismatch reduction
next_test.stop_condition: Stop on privacy, identity, inventory, or regulated-claim risk.

mechanisms.name: 线下归因与同意闸门
mechanisms.novelty_vs_existing_assets: Defines lawful connection and final business outcomes before content launches in high-ticket/offline contexts.
input_materials: minimum platform and first-party data scope

title: Promise only products, regions, and services the store can deliver.
Avoid unverifiable universal stock or lowest-price claims.
cover: Make price, store, model, region, and event-period conditions visible when material.
body: State service scope, official appointment path, data use, and limitations.
Never label a like or save as purchase intent without a defined downstream event.
workflow: Require content, media, store, CRM/data, and legal approval before launch.
Report public engagement, official leads, valid visits, orders, refund-adjusted orders, and unknown-attribution sales separately.

metrics.name: qualified_leads
metrics.definition: authorized leads matching service scope

metrics.name: valid_appointments
metrics.definition: confirmed appointments under a documented source rule

metrics.name: store_visit_rate
metrics.definition: valid visits divided by eligible appointments

metrics.name: net_order_rate
metrics.definition: refund-adjusted orders divided by the declared base

metrics.name: unknown_attribution_share
metrics.definition: offline outcomes not safely linkable to a source

metrics.name: match_failure_rate
metrics.definition: authorized joins that fail reconciliation

metrics.name: consent_withdrawal_or_complaint
metrics.definition: privacy opt-outs, withdrawals, or complaints

failure_conditions: Metrics are selected after launch or after results are visible.
Identity is joined without a lawful basis and explicit process.
Intermediate metrics replace final business outcomes.
Paid and natural sources are merged.
Award-entry numbers are accepted without independent audit.
Online attention substitutes for offline order evidence.

case_examples.observation: A paid award entry describes intermediate metrics, multi-round testing, KOS, and first-party offline transaction connection.
Company filings connect or plan to connect platform, store, membership, inventory, fulfillment, and service operations.

mechanisms.paid_causality_guard: The cited award case is paid/mixed and self-reported. Only the pre-launch measurement architecture is retained; no result or causal claim is imported.

next_test.design: Use one approved appointment path and one store/region; pre-register events, window, refund, unknown bucket, natural/paid labels, and privacy controls.
next_test.primary_outcome: refund-adjusted outcome plus unknown-attribution and privacy error rates
next_test.stop_condition: Stop immediately if consent, minimization, security, or downstream service cannot be maintained.

mechanisms.name: AI初稿下游修复
mechanisms.novelty_vs_existing_assets: Adds fact/time/source, human experience, narrative, and camera-performance QA after AI generation rather than generic anti-template editing.

title: Verify every number, date, source, and current-trend claim.
Remove invented experience and quotations; rewrite template language into a concrete job the account can truthfully own.
cover: Confirm image, person, scene, and result are from the same truthful evidence chain.
Apply current disclosure/label requirements to generated or edited media; never use an irreproducible image as product proof.
body: Label source_fact, human_experience, brand_requirement, and model_suggestion during review.
Trace facts to sources, require human confirmation for first-person experience, repair causal structure, and add real tradeoffs/failure conditions.
workflow: Keep draft-to-human-edit-to-final diff and count verification labor in scheduling.
For video, test sentence rhythm, executable actions, proof shots, and natural delivery rather than editing text alone.

metrics.name: source_completeness
metrics.definition: verifiable claims with traceable original sources

metrics.name: fact_or_time_error
metrics.definition: incorrect, stale, or unsupported factual claims found before/after release

metrics.name: invented_experience_blocked
metrics.definition: first-person or customer claims removed because no human source confirmed them

metrics.name: human_rewrite_share
metrics.definition: material draft segments restructured or rewritten by a responsible human

metrics.name: rehearsal_or_retake_count
metrics.definition: video/voice repetitions caused by unnatural or unprovable script

metrics.name: approval_reject_reason
metrics.definition: fact, rights, disclosure, narrative, brand, or performance cause

metrics.name: post_release_correction_or_complaint
metrics.definition: correction, takedown, or complaint tied to draft quality

failure_conditions: Editing is limited to synonym substitution.
The goal is to hide AI involvement rather than make claims truthful.
Human-sounding text masks fabricated experience.
Stale trends or invented sources survive review.
The named creator never confirms first-person content.
Text reads naturally but on-camera performance remains scripted and evidence-free.

case_examples.observation: Sixteen interviewed creators, ten mainly on Xiaohongshu, describe fact/trend verification, colloquial rewrite, narrative reconstruction, and camera-performance repair after AI use.
case_examples.confounders: interview self-report; individual time claims are not industry averages

mechanisms.paid_causality_guard: The QA applies to truthful production in both natural and commercial content, but no traffic effect is claimed.

next_test.design: For 20 AI-assisted drafts, classify every material human edit and every caught error before publication.
next_test.primary_outcome: fact/time/source error prevention and review burden
next_test.stop_condition: Do not publish any draft with unconfirmed first-person experience, rights, or commercial disclosure.

mechanisms.name: 数据血缘与观察窗
mechanisms.novelty_vs_existing_assets: Adds source, capture time, refresh rate, tracking window, version, and reconciliation before comparing owned and competitor metrics.

title: Timestamp every title version; without version time, a curve cannot be attributed to a title change.
cover: Create a new version event when replacing a cover; screenshots are point-in-time evidence, not a live data source.
body: Version body, tag, location, and commercial-label changes and cite the effective version in review.
workflow: Compare only within aligned sources and observation windows.
Keep owned backend and competitor public data separate.
After a tool stops tracking, mark not_observed rather than zero or end-of-life.

metrics.name: unknown_data_source_share
metrics.definition: reported metrics without a traceable source

metrics.name: refresh_latency
metrics.definition: time between platform event and tool observation when measurable

metrics.name: same_metric_discrepancy
metrics.definition: difference for nominally similar metrics after definition/time alignment

metrics.name: missing_version_share
metrics.definition: published or edited objects without version metadata

metrics.name: out_of_window_sample_count
metrics.definition: objects no longer observed by the selected tool

metrics.name: unresolved_reconciliation_count
metrics.definition: material metric differences without a documented explanation

metrics.name: history_backfill_coverage
metrics.definition: period for which comparable source-aligned data is available

failure_conditions: Platform backend and third-party metrics are compared directly.
Different capture times are treated as the same point.
A tool's 10/30-day tracking window is called content lifespan.
Competitor public interaction and owned backend exposure are mixed.
Edits overwrite prior title, cover, body, or metric records.

case_examples.observation: KAWO documents different owned and competitor tracking periods for Xiaohongshu posts.
KAWO documents different owned/competitor data sources and refresh schedules that can produce mismatches.
The product's create/preview/schedule/archive fields provide a publish-object model to which version metadata can be attached.

mechanisms.paid_causality_guard: Natural and paid results require separate source fields even when the same tool displays them; no tool window supports an algorithm inference.

next_test.design: For ten owned posts and ten competitor posts, capture source, time, refresh, window, and version, then reconcile nominally similar metrics without forcing equality.
next_test.primary_outcome: unknown provenance, unexplained discrepancy, and not-observed classification
next_test.stop_condition: Stop any comparison when definitions or time windows cannot be aligned.

rejected_or_downgraded_candidates.reason: Paid-course dumps, cloud-drive copies, and reuploaded decks were not used even when they appeared operationally detailed.
Show notes can establish episode topics but cannot support untranscribed operational claims.
Only visible budget/workflow/measurement architecture is retained; self-reported traffic, search, GMV, ROI, and causality are not imported.
Headcount is recruitment demand, not actual staffing or proof of execution.
A plan supports organizational intent only, not implementation or effect.
Paid-product thresholds and optimization advice remain product-, objective-, account-, and time-specific.
The window is an instrumentation limit and says nothing about how long a post can continue receiving activity.

limitations: Public briefs show requested work, not actual delivery or effect.
Job descriptions show organizational intent, not actual capability or compliance.
The KOC labor study covers a small historical 2021-2023 sample.
The creator-group governance study supports bounded sample observations and not any accusation about a specific trend.
The AI study is interview-based and does not supply a universal labor-time benchmark.
The award case is self-submitted, paid/mixed, and lacks independent outcome and privacy-process audit.
Company filings mix content, media, retail, membership, product, inventory, and service operations.
KAWO documents one SaaS product's fields and observation limits, not Xiaohongshu's universal API, algorithm, or content lifecycle.
No authorized full 2024-2026 podcast transcript with sufficient operational detail met the evidence gate.

verification.url_presence: passed: every source record has an HTTP(S) primary URL

url_reachability.method: parallel curl GET with redirects, browser user-agent, 5-second connect timeout, 20-second maximum
cli_exceptions: HPS02 and HPS07 returned curl code 000 in the batch check but had been readable through browser/web retrieval during research.
HPS17 DOI returned 403 to the command-line request; the DOI metadata and the author-uploaded full-text link were inspected during research.
